_comment: RECOMMENDED EXAMPLE model manifest for the paid app (W5-5, E-8). The exact list + revision pins are the open model-strategy decision (docs/HANDOFF-MICKAEL.md §2). 'bundled' = ship in installer / fetch on first run (works offline). 'on_demand' = download with consent on first use. TODO before launch: confirm repos + pin every 'revision' to a commit SHA for supply-chain integrity. Models install to ~/.codec/models/<name>/ (never inside the .app).
